Text.Page: The prions used to be a proud and powerful race with a thriving empire. The high elves nearly annihilated them, whittling their civilization down to mere splinters. Now the prions wander in search of tools they can use to claw their way back to power.

The prions gather much of their power from relics of the giants, the very same relics that interest the Mysterium, which puts us at odds with them.

Eudon knows more about the history of the prions, if the cares to learn.

Grenan is not all there in his mind, if you understand my meaning. It was not us who told him the history of the prions. Their history is of little importance. They're desperate and ruthless. That is all <PCNAME> needs to know.
